html:
Exclusive to:

“Restores three times as much hunger when eaten by Woby.”

-

The Woby Snacks is a character-specific item exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It can only be crafted by Walter after unlocking the Special Treat skill. It requires 1 Monster Jerky to make 2 Woby Snacks. When eaten by the player, it restores 9.4 but reduce 1 and 5 . When fed to Woby, it restores 28.2 , three times the player's amount.

Woby Snacks are non-perishable and can replenish over half of Woby's hunger, making them useful for keeping Woby in big form. Pigs can be given Woby Snacks to befriend them, and will transform into Werepigs after consuming 4 of them. Woodie will be transformed into a random Wereform after eating 2 of them.

Trivia

  • The name "Woby Snacks" could be a reference to Scooby Snacks from Scooby Doo.

Exclusive to:
“I think I'm barking up the wrong tree with this snack.”
–Wilson
“Honestly, I've eaten worse.”
–Willow
“Wolfgang know this for dog, but still…”
–Wolfgang
“Woby loves these.”
–Wendy
“ORGANICS DIED TO MAKE THIS. GOOD”
–WX-78
“These will make our dear Woby grow big and strong.”
–Wickerbottom
“I guess if I were starving…”
–Woodie
“I thought I saw Wilson munching on one.”
–Maxwell
“Wöby döth deserve all manner öf fine victuals and sweetmeats.”
–Wigfrid
“One for Woby, one for us!”
–Webber
“I heard they have unique mouthfeel.”
–Warly
“Woofer stuff”
–Wormwood
“Aww, Miss Woby wanna biscuit?”
–Winona
“Lookie, lookie! A doggie's cookie!”
–Wortox
“Smell… familiar.”
–Wurt
“Woby's favourite!”
–Walter
“I suppose with a really strong cup of tea… nah.”
–Wanda
“Restores three times as much hunger when eaten by Woby.”
-
The Woby Snacks is a character-specific item exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It can only be crafted by Walter after unlocking the Special Treat skill. It requires 1 Monster Jerky to make 2 Woby Snacks. When eaten by the player, it restores 9.4 but reduce 1 and 5 . When fed to Woby, it restores 28.2 , three times the player's amount.
Woby Snacks are non-perishable and can replenish over half of Woby's hunger, making them useful for keeping Woby in big form. Pigs can be given Woby Snacks to befriend them, and will transform into Werepigs after consuming 4 of them. Woodie will be transformed into a random Wereform after eating 2 of them.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The name "Woby Snacks" could be a reference to Scooby Snacks from Scooby Doo.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Woby Snacks là một vật phẩm dành riêng cho từng nhân vật chỉ có trong Don't Starve Together. Nó chỉ có thể được chế tạo bởi Walter sau khi mở khóa kỹ năng Điều trị Đặc biệt. Cần 1 Thịt Khô Quái để làm 2 Món Ăn Nhẹ Woby. Khi người chơi ăn nó, nó hồi 9,4 nhưng giảm 1 và 5. Khi cho Woby ăn, nó sẽ hồi lại 28,2, gấp ba lần số tiền của người chơi.
